methods.int available():
Returns an estimate of the number of remaining bytes that can be read (or
 skipped over) from this input stream without blocking by the next
 invocation of a method for this input stream.
methods.void close():
Closes this file input stream and releases any system resources
 associated with the stream.
methods.void finalize():
Ensures that theclosemethod of this file input stream is
 called when there are no more references to it.
methods.FileChannel getChannel(): Returns the uniqueFileChannelobject associated with this file input stream.
methods.FileDescriptor getFD():
Returns theFileDescriptorobject  that represents the connection to
 the actual file in the file system being
 used by thisFileInputStream.
methods.int read(): Reads a byte of data from this input stream.
methods.int read(byte[]\u00a0b):
Reads up tob.lengthbytes of data from this input
 stream into an array of bytes.
methods.int read(byte[]\u00a0b,\n int\u00a0of:
Reads up tolenbytes of data from this input stream
 into an array of bytes.
methods.long skip(long\u00a0n):
Skips over and discardsnbytes of data from the
 input stream.
